category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a library and utilities for processing GIFs; official homepage describes GIFLIB as a GIF service library.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is giflib; current_curation.display-name is giflib.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GIFLIB project page; official site provides introduction and library reference pages.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official Gifsicle homepage has an 'On Github' link to kohler/gifsicle, and that GitHub repository identifies www.lcdf.org/gifsicle/ as its homepage.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says library and utilities for GIF processing; source_facts.executables lists GIF utility commands.
